articles.title: The F1 drivers with the longest gap between first and last wins
articles.summary: Lewis Hamilton’s victory at the Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix means he has now extended his own record of the longest winning career in Formula 1 history, but who else comes closest to matching the seven-time champ?

articles.title: Russell reflects on his Mercedes career in photos
articles.summary: George Russell hit a century of Grands Prix with Mercedes in Barcelona – a journey that began as a one-off replacement for Lewis Hamilton back in 2020, and has taken him to title contention under F1’s all-new 2026 era.

articles.title: Why Madrid’s La Monumental corner lives up to its name
articles.summary: Turn 12 at the new Madring circuit promises to be a corner unlike any other in F1.

articles.title: The exclusive club of British Ferrari winners
articles.summary: F1 Hall of Fame journalist David Tremayne looks at the magnificent seven Brits who have tasted F1 glory with Ferrari.

articles.title: Crawford to get another FP1 run with Aston Martin in Austria
articles.summary: Aston Martin have announced that their third driver, Jak Crawford, will take part in his latest Free Practice 1 session at the Austrian Grand Prix.

articles.title: Where Audi's main focus lies after a season of near misses
articles.summary: Audi's 2026 has shown plenty of promise already, but there is one key area the team need to focus on to boost performance.

articles.title: Mercedes withdraw Right of Review request over Monaco result
articles.summary: Mercedes have announced that they have withdrawn their Right of Review request over the results of the Monaco Grand Prix.

articles.title: Vasseur urges Ferrari to ‘stay calm’ amid title talk
articles.summary: Fred Vasseur has explained how he will be trying to keep Ferrari “calm” as the 2026 campaign develops, after Lewis Hamilton’s breakthrough win for the team generated talk of a championship challenge.

articles.title: Guimarães Rally Show regressa em julho com nova super especial urbana
articles.summary: O Guimarães Rally Show vai realizar-se no próximo dia 11 de julho de 2026, marcando o regresso das competições de rali à “Cidade Berço” após o sucesso da edição anterior. O evento é organizado pelo Motor Clube de Guimarã
